description: Style NoteWith plush cushioning and a supportive Fit, the nike 2.04 running shoe is perfect for those who love healthy runs. Lightweight and comfortable, this shoe also doubles up as a great everyday wear for those who enjoy long walks.Product DetailsWhite shoe with a mesh upper, gilly lacing-system and synthetic overlaysPadded tongue and inner (mesh)Dual-density phylon midsole and cushioned fabric footbedTPR outsole with multi-directional lugs, forefoot flex grooves, decoupled heel with a mid-heel scoop and arched midfootMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
